ABOUT US
Careers
Find Your Place At Techno Brain

Techno Brain Group is a leading provider of innovative IT and BPO solutions, serving clients worldwide. With a strong presence across Africa and beyond, we combine cutting-edge technology with a deep commitment to people and communities. Our mission is simple yet powerful: to empower lives through technology, innovation, and opportunity.

View Open Jobs
What we Stand For
At Techno Brain, our culture is built on diversity, courageous integrity, and a people-first philosophy. We believe that when our employees thrive, our company thrives. This is why we:
Valuing Diversity

We celebrate the unique perspectives and backgrounds of our employees, creating a rich tapestry of ideas and experiences that drive our success.

Courageous Integrity

We uphold the highest standards of integrity and transparency, encouraging our team to act with courage and honesty in everything they do. We have rich guidelines on code of conduct that clarifies roles of respective parties

Focus on People

Our people are our greatest asset. We prioritize their well-being, professional growth, and work-life balance, ensuring they feel valued and supported.

Youth Empowerment

We are committed to nurturing the next generation of leaders by providing opportunities for young talent to learn, grow, and lead. Through our employability programs and seasonal internship designed for nurture the young innovative daring talent in the market

Capacity Building

Continuous learning and development are at the core of our culture. We offer a range of training programs, workshops, and mentorship opportunities to help our employees reach their full potential.

Innovation at Heart

We thrive on innovation and encourage our team to think outside the box, explore new ideas, and drive transformative change. Through our in-house newsletter each staff is able to know how to contribute in the available capstone projects/tech labs

Our values come alive through a wide variety of events and initiatives that make Techno Brain more than just a workplace; it’s a community.

Hackathons
Inspire creativity and drive innovation across teams.

BPO Awards and Campaign Celebrations
Bring us together to celebrate success across the industry.

Techno Hero and Feather in Cap Awards
Honor exceptional contributions and achievements.

Wellness Sessions, Health Talks
Promote a healthier workplace and a better planet for all

Cultural Days & Bring Your Child Days
Fostering family and cultural pride.

Mother’s Day & Father’s Day Celebrations
Honoring family values.

End of Year Party

Tree Planting

Choosing Techno Brain means joining a team that’s passionate, driven, and dedicated to making a difference. Here’s what sets us apart:

Innovative Environment
Work on transformative projects in AI, cloud, and digital transformation.

Global Exposure
Collaborate across diverse cultures and industries.

Employee-Centric Culture
Every voice is valued; every contribution matters.

Comprehensive Benefits
From health plans to flexible work arrangements and wellness programs.

Career Advancement
Grow through continuous learning and performance-based progression.

Application via Zoho

Submit your application through our Zoho Recruit portal:
 → Browse openings
 → Upload CV
 → Complete form
 → Receive confirmation.

Technical Tests

Shortlisted candidates complete role-specific tests (coding, case studies, or scenarios) to evaluate practical skills and problem-solving.

Assessment Center

Selected candidates attend a virtual or in-person session including group exercises, simulations, panel interviews, and behavioral evaluations.

Offer & Onboarding

Successful candidates receive an offer and an onboarding package, followed by induction and team introduction.

Background Check

Final-stage candidates undergo standard checks: employment history, academic credentials, and references.

If you’re not selected at any stage, we truly appreciate your interest and effort.
With your consent, we’ll retain your profile in our talent database for future opportunities that match your skills and experience.

How You Can Grow With Us

We see Techno Brain not just as a workplace, but a launchpad for your career. 

With us, you can 

Advance Your Career
Access training, mentorship, and certifications

Innovate & Create
Work on pioneering projects that impact industries and communities

Gain Global Experience
Build cultural understanding and professional networks worldwide

Be Recognized
Your growth is tied to your contributions, not tenure

Thrive in Support
Enjoy a collaborative, flexible, and well-balanced environment

Techno Brain is an inclusive Equal Employment Opportunity employer that considers applicants without regard to gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Please note that Techno Brain will never ask for banking information in the context of the recruitment process. We will also never ask you for payment in exchange for being considered for a job
